title: Hoosick Falls Central School District ransomware incident

extortion.description: For the 2023 school year, there are 2 public schools serving 1,055 students in Hoosick Falls Central School District. This district's average testing ranking is 9/10, which is in the top 20% of public schools in New York.Public Schools in Hoosick Falls Central School District have an average math proficiency score of 77% (versus the New York public school average of 56%), and reading proficiency score of 76% (versus the 63% statewide average).https://www.hoosickfallscsd.org/
